objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
archetype: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
family: mean_reversion
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- bollinger(period=12, std_dev=2.2)
- rsi(period=7)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close < bollinger.lower and rsi < 20
- short: close > bollinger.upper and rsi > 60
exit:
- condition: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.5
tp_atr_mult: 5.5
description: ATR stop-loss (1.5x) and take-profit (5.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger bands and RSI can help identify mean reversion points in the market by checking when price is near the lower band and RSI is oversold, indicating a potential buying opportunity. The ATR risk management will ensure that significant losses are avoided.
